en.pageTitle: Manual Handling Training in Ireland – Frequently Asked Questions
manualFaq: Manual Handling Course – Complete Guide
Top Questions About Our Online Training
Your digital certificate is available for immediate download as soon as you successfully complete the course.
After finishing the theory modules, you can book a short virtual practical assessment (approximately 20–30 minutes) with one of our qualified assessors.
The total fee is €35, which includes the full training, final assessment, and practical evaluation. There are no hidden charges.
Our online platform is available 24/7, so you can complete your training at your own pace, from anywhere in Ireland.
The course works smoothly on smartphones, tablets, laptops, and desktop computers.
Practical Skills Assessment
Once you pass the theory exam, contact us via Online Chat to schedule your live practical session. This session is delivered in a virtual classroom and is fully included in the price.
Accreditation & Standards
This training is delivered in line with Irish workplace safety requirements and follows NFQ Level 6 standards.
Certificate Access
Your certificate will be sent to your registered email address and stored in your account for easy access and printing anytime.
Are there extra fees for the practical assessment?
No. The full course fee covers theory, assessment, and certification.
Satisfaction Guarantee
We offer a 15-day refund policy if you decide the course is not right for you, provided the training has not been completed and the certificate has not been issued.
Managing training for a team

We provide business accounts that allow employers to assign courses, monitor employee progress, and store certificates in one dashboard. Ideal for companies ensuring workplace safety compliance in Ireland.
Download User Guide:
aboutFaq: Any modern device with internet access and a web browser will allow you to complete the training.
Yes. All instructors hold recognised safety qualifications and deliver training aligned with Irish health and safety legislation.
Can I review the material after completing the course?
Yes. You will continue to have access to your training materials even after certification.
Is there a time limit to complete the course?
No. You can complete the course in one sitting or spread it out over multiple sessions. Your progress is saved automatically.
Can I take the course from outside Ireland?
Yes. The course is accessible globally, though it is designed to meet Irish workplace safety standards.
Yes. A 10% discount is automatically applied when purchasing 10 or more course licenses.
The theory content is available in multiple languages. The practical assessment is conducted in English.
purchaseFaq: Choose the course, complete registration, and begin training immediately online.
Simply add multiple licenses to your cart and assign them to employees through your dashboard after purchase.
We accept all major debit and credit cards. Businesses may also request an invoice for bank transfer payments.
Automatic discounts apply for larger orders to support company-wide compliance training.
Can I purchase the course for someone else?
Yes. Enter the learner’s name and email address during checkout and they will receive direct access.
loginFaq: I completed payment – what happens next?
Log into your account and activate your course from the dashboard. If you need help, our support team is available via Online Chat.
Use the password recovery link on the login page to reset your details securely.
If you experience technical issues, try clearing your browser cache or using the latest version of Google Chrome. Our support team is available if further assistance is needed.
assesFaq: What happens if I don’t pass the assessment?
You can retake the assessment at no additional cost. We provide ongoing access to help you succeed.
How do I receive my certificate?
Once you successfully complete the course and assessment, your certificate is generated instantly in PDF format.
What if I lose my certificate?
Your certificate remains stored in your account for future download, ensuring easy access whenever needed.
